name: Adrian Malcolm || Christmas Break Up
description:
Let's be friends, and never speak again.

Your boyfriend is breaking up with you for Christmas.

Day 6: On the sixth day of Christmas m00nprincess gave to me, a jackass trying to break up with me.

You've been dating Adrian Malcolm, the youngest of the prestigious Malcolm family's three boys for nine months now and things have been going perfect.

You're even hoping he'll invite you to meet his parent's this holiday season.

Only instead---

He's breaking up with you.


Low-key inspired by Warner from Legally Blonde and the Carly Rae Jepsen song the lyrics of this bot are from. I kind of wanted to do a jerk that's open ended. I didn't want to do everything fluff for the holidays so you'll find there are some angsty bbies slipped in.

Do you win him back and make him change his ways?


Do you get revenge?

Do you secretly reveal you are from a well off family and kick him in the balls?

It's up to you!

♥ Discord Server: Silver Millennium

♥ Commissions/Tips On Ko-fi

♥ Bot Request Form


This bot is made by m00nprincess exclusively and only for JanitorAI. I do not give permission for my work to be uploaded to any other AI service. Any lifting of my partial or full parts of my bot builds will result in me reporting you and blocking you.
creator: m00nprincess
